final_prompt.prompt:
Create an architectural visualization rendering of a modern living room blending Nordic minimalism with Japanese wabi-sabi aesthetics.

Style/medium: photorealistic interior visualization, architectural rendering with natural material textures
Composition: eye-level perspective across the main living area, wide-angle lens capturing sofa zone and window wall, balanced negative space
Subject: low-profile linen off-white fabric sofa with mixed-texture cushions, irregular natural stone coffee table with raw edge, tall fiddle-leaf fig plant in corner, slender arched floor lamp
Scene/backdrop: modern living room with large floor-to-ceiling windows showing blurred green vegetation outside, light white oak solid wood flooring, matte white painted walls, bookshelf with curated books and ceramic objects following minimalist principles
Lighting/mood: abundant soft natural daylight from floor-to-ceiling windows, gentle diffused illumination creating quiet and restrained zen atmosphere
Color palette: white and light gray as base, off-white linen as anchor, natural wood and stone textures as organic accents
Materials/textures: matte white painted walls, light white oak wood flooring with visible grain, natural linen fabric with subtle weave, raw-edge stone with organic texture, ceramic with handmade quality
Avoid: clutter, excessive decoration, bright saturated colors, artificial harsh lighting, glossy plastic surfaces, deformed furniture proportions
